description: Represents a routing rule. When the incoming request to a domain name matches the conditions for a rule, API Gateway invokes a stage of a target API. Supported only for REST APIs.

RoutingRuleId.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

RoutingRuleArn.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

DomainNameArn.description: The ARN of the domain name.
DomainNameArn.markdownDescription:
The ARN of the domain name.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Update requires: Replacement

Priority.description: The order in which API Gateway evaluates a rule. Priority is evaluated from the lowest value to the highest value. Rules can't have the same priority. Priority values 1-1,000,000 are supported.
Priority.markdownDescription:
The order in which API Gateway evaluates a rule. Priority is evaluated from the lowest value to the highest value. Rules can't have the same priority. Priority values 1-1,000,000 are supported.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption

Conditions.description: The conditions of the routing rule.
Conditions.markdownDescription:
The conditions of the routing rule.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

Actions.description: The resulting action based on matching a routing rules condition. Only InvokeApi is supported.
Actions.markdownDescription:
The resulting action based on matching a routing rules condition. Only InvokeApi is supported.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

MatchHeaders.markdownDescription:
The headers to be matched.

---

Required: No  
Type:   
Update requires: No interruption

MatchBasePaths.description: The base path to be matched.
MatchBasePaths.markdownDescription:
The base path to be matched.

---

Required: No  
Type:   
Update requires: No interruption

Condition.description: Represents a condition. Conditions can contain up to two ``matchHeaders`` conditions and one ``matchBasePaths`` conditions. API Gateway evaluates header conditions and base path conditions together. You can only use AND between header and base path conditions.
Condition.markdownDescription:
Represents a condition. Conditions can contain up to two ``matchHeaders`` conditions and one ``matchBasePaths`` conditions. API Gateway evaluates header conditions and base path conditions together. You can only use AND between header and base path conditions.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

AnyOf.description: The header name and header value glob to be matched. The matchHeaders condition is matched if any of the header name and header value globs are matched.
AnyOf.markdownDescription:
The header name and header value glob to be matched. The matchHeaders condition is matched if any of the header name and header value globs are matched.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

MatchHeaders.markdownDescription:
Represents a ``MatchHeaders`` condition.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

items.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption

AnyOf.description: The string of the case sensitive base path to be matched.
AnyOf.markdownDescription:
The string of the case sensitive base path to be matched.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

MatchBasePaths.markdownDescription:
Represents a ``MatchBasePaths`` condition.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

Header.description: The case insensitive header name to be matched. The header name must be less than 40 characters and the only allowed characters are ``a-z``, ``A-Z``, ``0-9``, and the following special characters: ``*?-!#$%&'.^_`|~.``.
Header.markdownDescription:
The case insensitive header name to be matched. The header name must be less than 40 characters and the only allowed characters are ``a-z``, ``A-Z``, ``0-9``, and the following special characters: ``*?-!#$%&'.^_`|~.``.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption

ValueGlob.description: The case sensitive header glob value to be matched against entire header value. The header glob value must be less than 128 characters and the only allowed characters are ``a-z``, ``A-Z``, ``0-9``, and the following special characters: ``*?-!#$%&'.^_`|~``. Wildcard matching is supported for header glob values but must be for ``*prefix-match``, ``suffix-match*``, or ``*infix*-match``.
ValueGlob.markdownDescription:
The case sensitive header glob value to be matched against entire header value. The header glob value must be less than 128 characters and the only allowed characters are ``a-z``, ``A-Z``, ``0-9``, and the following special characters: ``*?-!#$%&'.^_`|~``. Wildcard matching is supported for header glob values but must be for ``*prefix-match``, ``suffix-match*``, or ``*infix*-match``.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption

MatchHeaderValue.markdownDescription:
Represents a ``MatchHeaderValue``.

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption
